Document:
# Felinid
Felinids are lightweight cat-like humanoids. Mostly human in build, but with feline ears, a tail, claws, an animal stomach, and unusually sensitive eyes.
Their claws deal Piercing and Slash instead of Blunt damage, and they walk silently when barefoot.
Their animal stomach lets them safely digest raw meat, but theobromine is poisonous to them.
Their fur helps them tolerate the cold, but they overheat more easily than humans.
Felinids regenerate light physical wounds a little faster than humans while alive — but they are also slightly more fragile. They take [color=#1e90ff]10% less Cold damage[/color] but [color=#ffa500]10% more Blunt, Slash, Piercing and Heat damage[/color].
Their eyes are very sensitive: flashes blind them for significantly longer than other species, and have a chance to inflict permanent eye damage.
